intervention_detail: Schedule a meeting with the student to review their subject choices and workload. Assess whether the course difficulty matches the student's preparation level. Explore bridging courses if needed.
Enrol the student in a structured academic support or tutoring programme. Assign a faculty mentor to monitor progress weekly. Consider a reduced course load for the next semester.
Conduct an academic review meeting after the first semester. Identify subject-specific struggles and assign peer mentors. Set academic improvement goals for semester 2.

Connect the student with the financial aid office immediately. Explore available scholarships, bursaries, emergency funds, or payment plan options. Ensure overdue fees do not result in sudden deregistration.
